name: DevOps Engineer
description: Bridge development and operations by automating infrastructure, managing cloud deployments, and ensuring system reliability at scale.

phases.title: Linux, Scripting & Cloud Basics
items: 🐧 Master Linux administration: bash, file systems, process management, networking
💻 Learn scripting with Python and Bash for automation tasks
🔧 Version control advanced: Git branching strategies, rebase, hooks, submodules
☁️ Cloud fundamentals: AWS (EC2, S3, VPC, IAM) or equivalent GCP/Azure
📦 Containerization with Docker: Dockerfiles, multi-stage builds, Docker Compose
📚 Study networking basics: DNS, HTTP, TCP/IP, load balancers, firewalls

phases.title: Orchestration, CI/CD & IaC
items: ☸️ Kubernetes: pods, deployments, services, ConfigMaps, Helm charts
🔧 Infrastructure as Code with Terraform: modules, state management, remote backends
📐 CI/CD pipelines: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins (declarative pipelines)
🛡️ Security: secrets management (Vault), SAST, container scanning, SBOM
📊 Monitoring & observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, OpenTelemetry
🔗 Configuration management with Ansible: playbooks, roles, inventories

phases.title: Production SRE & Platform Engineering
items: 🏗️ Design high-availability architectures: multi-AZ, auto-scaling, disaster recovery
⚡ Advanced Kubernetes: operators, service mesh (Istio), custom controllers, Karpenter
📐 GitOps with ArgoCD or Flux: declarative deployments, sync policies, PR-based workflows
🛡️ Security deep-dive: zero-trust, pod security, network policies, runtime security (Falco)
📊 SRE practices: SLIs/SLOs, error budgets, incident response, runbooks (PagerDuty)
💼 Capstone: design and deploy a production-grade multi-service platform with full observability
